--// Melon Decompiler [Private] v1.1
--// Resolved: 52 identifiers | 14 functions | 4 strings

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local Character = LocalPlayer.Character
local Humanoid = Character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local HumanoidRootPart = Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
local ItemsFolder = Workspace:WaitForChild("Items")
local RemoteEvents = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("RemoteEvents")
local ConsumeItemRemote = RemoteEvents:WaitForChild("RequestConsumeItem")

local WalkSpeedEnabled = false
local WalkSpeedValue = 16
local JumpPowerEnabled = false
local JumpPowerValue = 50
local InfiniteJumpEnabled = false
local NoclipEnabled = false

local AutoFeedSettings = {
    AlwaysFeed = { Log = false, Coal = false, FuelCanister = false, OilBarrel = false, Biofuel = false },
    HPBased = { Log = false, Coal = false, FuelCanister = false, OilBarrel = false, Biofuel = false }
}
local AutoCookSettings = { Morsel = false, Steak = false }
local AutoGrindSettings = {}
local AutoBiofuelSettings = {}
local AutoEatInterval = false
local AutoEatHPBased = false

loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EdgeIY/infiniteyield/master/source"))()

local Rayfield = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/scripture2025/UI/refs/heads/main/Rayfield-UI"))()

local Window = Rayfield:CreateWindow({
    Name = "Flash Hub | 99 Nights in a Forest | BYPASSED",
    LoadingTitle = "Loading...",
    LoadingSubtitle = "by Flashh",
    Icon = 0,
    ToggleUIKeybind = "K",
    DisableBuildWarnings = false,
    DisableRayfieldPrompts = false,
    KeySystem = false,
    ConfigurationSaving = {
        Enabled = true,
        FileName = "Big Hub"
    },
    Discord = {
        Enabled = false,
        Invite = "noinvitelink",
        RememberJoins = true
    },
    Theme = {
        Background = Color3.fromRGB(10, 15, 30),
        Topbar = Color3.fromRGB(15, 25, 45),
        Shadow = Color3.fromRGB(5, 10, 20),
        TextColor = Color3.fromRGB(170, 200, 255),
        TabBackground = Color3.fromRGB(40, 60, 100),
        TabBackgroundSelected = Color3.fromRGB(25, 40, 80),
        TabTextColor = Color3.fromRGB(170, 200, 255),
        SelectedTabTextColor = Color3.fromRGB(120, 170, 255),
        TabStroke = Color3.fromRGB(50, 70, 120),
        ElementBackground = Color3.fromRGB(20, 30, 55),
        ElementBackgroundHover = Color3.fromRGB(30, 45, 80),
        ElementStroke = Color3.fromRGB(70, 110, 180),
        SecondaryElementBackground = Color3.fromRGB(15, 25, 45),
        SecondaryElementStroke = Color3.fromRGB(50, 90, 160),
        ToggleBackground = Color3.fromRGB(20, 25, 45),
        ToggleEnabled = Color3.fromRGB(100, 150, 255),
        ToggleDisabled = Color3.fromRGB(90, 90, 90),
        ToggleEnabledStroke = Color3.fromRGB(70, 120, 200),
        ToggleDisabledStroke = Color3.fromRGB(60, 60, 60),
        ToggleEnabledOuterStroke = Color3.fromRGB(50, 90, 160),
        ToggleDisabledOuterStroke = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40),
        InputBackground = Color3.fromRGB(15, 25, 45),
        InputStroke = Color3.fromRGB(70, 110, 190),
        PlaceholderColor = Color3.fromRGB(140, 180, 255),
        DropdownSelected = Color3.fromRGB(30, 45, 80),
        DropdownUnselected = Color3.fromRGB(20, 30, 55),
        SliderBackground = Color3.fromRGB(40, 70, 120),
        SliderProgress = Color3.fromRGB(100, 150, 255),
        SliderStroke = Color3.fromRGB(70, 120, 200),
        NotificationBackground = Color3.fromRGB(20, 30, 55),
        NotificationActionsBackground = Color3.fromRGB(35, 50, 80)
    }
})

local InfoTab = Window:CreateTab("Information", 4483362458)
InfoTab:CreateSection("READ THIS MESSAGE")
InfoTab:CreateLabel("This script will fully load with all the tabs inside a Match, not in the Lobby!")
InfoTab:CreateSection("Useful Information")
InfoTab:CreateLabel("Kill Aura is at the bottom of Auto Farm tab!")
InfoTab:CreateSection("Rayfield Information")
InfoTab:CreateLabel("Click K to Open and Close the GUI!", nil)
InfoTab:CreateLabel("If your Mobile there will be a Rayfield button at the top of the screen if you X out of this Rayfield and you can open it again!", nil)

Rayfield:Notify({
    Title = "Flash Hub Loading...",
    Content = "Wait 5-10 Seconds for all Tabs to load!",
    Duration = 6.5,
    Image = 4483362458
})

local PlayerTab = Window:CreateTab("Player", 4483362458)

PlayerTab:CreateSection("INFINITE HEALTH")
PlayerTab:CreateButton({
    Name = "Infinite Health (UNPATCHED)",
    Callback = function()
        loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/scripture2025/FlashHub/refs/heads/main/InfHealth"))()
    end
})

PlayerTab:CreateSection("Walkspeed Configuration")
PlayerTab:CreateToggle({
    Name = "Enable WalkSpeed",
    CurrentValue = false,
    Flag = "WalkSpeedToggle",
    Callback = function(value)
        WalkSpeedEnabled = value
    end
})

PlayerTab:CreateSlider({
    Name = "WalkSpeed Slider",
    Range = {16, 500},
    Increment = 1,
    Suffix = "speed",
    CurrentValue = 16,
    Flag = "WalkSpeedSlider",
    Callback = function(value)
        WalkSpeedValue = value
        if WalkSpeedEnabled then
            Humanoid.WalkSpeed = value
        end
    end
})

PlayerTab:CreateSection("JumpPower Configuration")
PlayerTab:CreateToggle({
    Name = "Enable JumpPower",
    CurrentValue = false,
    Flag = "JumpPowerToggle",
    Callback = function(value)
        JumpPowerEnabled = value
        if value then
            Humanoid.UseJumpPower = true
        end
    end
})

PlayerTab:CreateSlider({
    Name = "JumpPower Slider",
    Range = {50, 750},
    Increment = 1,
    Suffix = "Jump Power",
    CurrentValue = 50,
    Flag = "JumpPowerSlider",
    Callback = function(value)
        JumpPowerValue = value
        if JumpPowerEnabled then
            Humanoid.UseJumpPower = true
            Humanoid.JumpPower = value
        end
    end
})

task.spawn(function()
    while task.wait(0.2) do
        if JumpPowerEnabled then
            local char = LocalPlayer.Character
            if char then
                local hum = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if hum then
                    hum.UseJumpPower = true
                    hum.JumpPower = JumpPowerValue
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)

PlayerTab:CreateSection("Other Stuff")
PlayerTab:CreateToggle({
    Name = "Infinite Jump",
    CurrentValue = false,
    Flag = "InfiniteJumpToggle",
    Callback = function(value)
        InfiniteJumpEnabled = value
    end
})

PlayerTab:CreateToggle({
    Name = "Noclip",
    CurrentValue = false,
    Flag = "NoclipToggle",
    Callback = function(value)
        NoclipEnabled = value
    end
})

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    if WalkSpeedEnabled then
        Humanoid.WalkSpeed = WalkSpeedValue
    end
end)

UserInputService.JumpRequest:Connect(function()
    if InfiniteJumpEnabled then
        Humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
    end
end)

RunService.Stepped:Connect(function()
    if NoclipEnabled then
        for _, part in pairs(Character:GetDescendants()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                part.CanCollide = false
            end
        end
    end
end)

LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newCharacter)
    Character = newCharacter
    Humanoid = newCharacter:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    HumanoidRootPart = newCharacter:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
end)

local AutoFarmTab = Window:CreateTab("Auto Farm", 4483362458)

local function createFuelToggle(section, itemName, settingsTable, key)
    section:CreateToggle({
        Name = itemName,
        CurrentValue = false,
        Callback = function(value)
            settingsTable[key] = value
        end
    })
end

AutoFarmTab:CreateSection("Always Feed Campfire (ignores HP)")
for _, item in ipairs({"Log", "Coal", "FuelCanister", "OilBarrel", "Biofuel"}) do
    AutoFarmTab:CreateToggle({
        Name = item:gsub("(%u)", " %1"):gsub("^%s", ""),
        CurrentValue = false,
        Callback = function(value)
            AutoFeedSettings.AlwaysFeed[item] = value
        end
    })
end

AutoFarmTab:CreateSection("Auto Feed Campfire (HP Based)")
for _, item in ipairs({"Log", "Coal", "FuelCanister", "OilBarrel", "Biofuel"}) do
    AutoFarmTab:CreateToggle({
        Name = item:gsub("(%u)", " %1"):gsub("^%s", ""),
        CurrentValue = false,
        Callback = function(value)
            AutoFeedSettings.HPBased[item] = value
        end
    })
end

AutoFarmTab:CreateSection("Auto Cook Food")
for _, item in ipairs({"Morsel", "Steak"}) do
    AutoFarmTab:CreateToggle({
        Name = item,
        CurrentValue = false,
        Callback = function(value)
            AutoCookSettings[item] = value
        end
    })
end

AutoFarmTab:CreateSection("Auto Machine Grind")
local grindItems = {"UFO Junk", "UFO Component", "Old Car Engine", "Broken Fan", "Old Microwave", "Bolt", "Log", "Sheet Metal", "Old Radio", "Tyre", "Washing Machine", "Broken Microwave"}
for _, item in ipairs(grindItems) do
    AutoFarmTab:CreateToggle({
        Name = item,
        CurrentValue = false,
        Callback = function(value)
            AutoGrindSettings[item] = value
        end
    })
end

AutoFarmTab:CreateSection("Auto Biofuel Processor")
local biofuelItems = {"Carrot", "Corn", "Pumpkin", "Cooked Morsel", "Morsel", "Steak", "Cooked Steak", "Log"}
for _, item in ipairs(biofuelItems) do
    AutoFarmTab:CreateToggle({
        Name = item,
        CurrentValue = false,
        Callback = function(value)
            AutoBiofuelSettings[item] = value
        end
    })
end

AutoFarmTab:CreateSection("Auto Eat")
AutoFarmTab:CreateToggle({
    Name = "Auto Eat (3 sec interval)",
    CurrentValue = false,
    Callback = function(value)
        AutoEatInterval = value
    end
})

AutoFarmTab:CreateToggle({
    Name = "Auto Eat (HP Bar Based)",
    CurrentValue = false,
    Callback = function(value)
        AutoEatHPBased = value
    end
})

local function getCampfireHealth()
    local map = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
    if not map then return 1 end
    
    local campground = map:FindFirstChild("Campground")
    if not campground then return 1 end
    
    local mainFire = campground:FindFirstChild("MainFire")
    if not mainFire then return 1 end
    
    local center = mainFire:FindFirstChild("Center")
    if not center then return 1 end
    
    local billboard = center:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui")
    if not billboard then return 1 end
    
    local frame = billboard:FindFirstChild("Frame")
    if not frame then return 1 end
    
    local background = frame:FindFirstChild("Background")
    if not background then return 1 end
    
    local fill = background:FindFirstChild("Fill")
    if not fill then return 1 end
    
    return fill.Size.X.Scale
end

task.spawn(function()
    while task.wait(3) do
        for itemName, enabled in pairs(AutoFeedSettings.AlwaysFeed) do
            if enabled then
                for _, item in ipairs(ItemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                    if item.Name == itemName then
                        ConsumeItemRemote:FireServer(item, "Campfire")
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        
        local campfireHP = getCampfireHealth()
        if campfireHP < 0.5 then
            for itemName, enabled in pairs(AutoFeedSettings.HPBased) do
                if enabled then
                    for _, item in ipairs(ItemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                        if item.Name == itemName then
                            ConsumeItemRemote:FireServer(item, "Campfire")
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while task.wait(4) do
        for itemName, enabled in pairs(AutoCookSettings) do
            if enabled then
                for _, item in ipairs(ItemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                    if item.Name == itemName then
                        ConsumeItemRemote:FireServer(item, "Cook")
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while task.wait(3) do
        if AutoEatInterval then
            for _, item in ipairs(ItemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                if item.Name:find("Cooked") or item.Name == "Carrot" or item.Name == "Corn" then
                    ConsumeItemRemote:FireServer(item, "Eat")
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        
        if AutoEatHPBased and Humanoid.Health < Humanoid.MaxHealth * 0.5 then
            for _, item in ipairs(ItemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                if item.Name:find("Cooked") or item.Name == "Carrot" or item.Name == "Corn" then
                    ConsumeItemRemote:FireServer(item, "Eat")
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)
